# LaventeCare Frontend - AI Context & Guidelines

> **Context**: This is an Astro 5 + React + Convex application using Tailwind CSS v4.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: [Astro 5](https://astro.build) (SSR/Static Hybrid)
- **UI Architecture**: Islands Architecture (React for interactivity)
- **Backend**: [Convex](https://convex.dev) (Realtime Database & Functions)
- **State Management**: [Nanostores](https://github.com/nanostores/nanostores) (Framework-agnostic state)
- **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com) + "Glassmorphism" Design System
- **Testing**: Playwright (E2E)

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── ui/             # Atoms: reusable, small components (Button, Card)
│   ├── blocks/         # Molecules/Organisms: sections of a page (Hero, Navbar, Footer)
│   └── islands/        # Interactive: Client-side React components (Forms, Complex Logic)
├── layouts/            # Astro Layouts
├── lib/
│   ├── convex.ts       # Convex Client initialization
│   ├── utils.ts        # Helper functions (cn, etc.)
│   └── config.ts       # Global constants
├── pages/              # File-based routing
└── styles/
    └── global.css      # Global styles & Tailwind v4 configuration
```

## Key Patterns

1.  **Islands Architecture**: Use `.astro` files for static content. Only use `.tsx` (React) when interactivity is required. Use `client:load` or `client:visible` directives in Astro.
2.  **Styling**: Use Tailwind utility classes. For conflicts, use `cn()`.
3.  **Data Fetching**:
    *   **Static/Server**: Use Astro frontmatter (await/async).
    *   **Client**: Use Convex React hooks (`useQuery`, `useMutation`) in islands.
4.  **Glassmorphism**: The design relies heavily on transparency, backdrop-blur, and borders. Check `global.css` for implementation details.

## Documentation References

- `ARCHITECTURE.md`: High-level system design.
- `README.md`: Quick start and overview.
- `.agent/`: Custom agent behaviors and skills.
